title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入伯利兹：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入貝里斯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Belize Bureau of Standards (BBS) conformity requirements, PUC interconnection approval requirements, BEL connection agreement requirements, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation expectations, UL 1973 and UL 9540 product safety references, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and the critical 60 Hz / 110–220 V grid context — versus China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 baselines. Belize operates a 60 Hz grid (North American/Caribbean standard), representing a fundamental frequency and voltage mismatch versus Chinese 50 Hz / 220/380 V BESS products; PCS re-engineering and revalidation for 60 Hz is required.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与伯利兹标准局（BBS）合格评定要求、PUC并网审批要求、BEL并网协议要求、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UL 1973和UL 9540产品安全参考依据、UN 38.3运输要求及关键60 Hz / 110–220 V电网背景——对比中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基准的差距对照。伯利兹采用60 Hz电网（北美/加勒比标准），与中国50 Hz / 220/380 V BESS产品存在根本性频率和电压不匹配；须针对60 Hz对储能变流器进行全面重新设计和重新验证。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與貝里斯標準局（BBS）合格評定要求、PUC併網審批要求、BEL併網協議要求、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UL 1973和UL 9540產品安全參考依據、UN 38.3運輸要求及關鍵60 Hz / 110–220 V電網背景——對比中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基準的差距對照。貝里斯採用60 Hz電網（北美/加勒比標準），與中國50 Hz / 220/380 V BESS產品存在根本性頻率和電壓不匹配；須針對60 Hz對儲能變流器進行全面重新設計和重新驗證。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BBS conformity scope determination, PUC interconnection approval, BEL connection agreement, BNFS fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Belize BBS standards requirements, PUC interconnection technical specifications, BEL connection agreement requirements, BNFS fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BBS合格评定范围裁定、PUC并网审批、BEL并网协议、BNFS消防安全安装审批、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行伯利兹BBS标准要求、PUC并网技术规格、BEL并网协议要求、BNFS消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BBS合格評定範圍裁定、PUC併網審批、BEL併網協議、BNFS消防安全安裝審批、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行伯利兹BBS標準要求、PUC併網技術規格、BEL併網協議要求、BNFS消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Belize does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to a national certification scheme. BESS projects in Belize operate under PUC interconnection approval and BEL connection agreements, with project-level technical requirements driven by international development finance conditions (IDB, CDB, IFC) and North American/Americas engineering standards. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Belize are: (1) a fundamental 60 Hz vs 50 Hz frequency mismatch AND a 110/220 V split-phase vs 220/380 V three-phase voltage mismatch — both require PCS hardware re-engineering and full revalidation, not just software reconfiguration; (2) UL 1973 cell and module safety evidence (or IEC 62619 in internationally financed projects) as the technically expected baseline for project acceptance in the Americas/Caribbean direction — Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not accepted as substitutes; (3) PUC interconnection approval and BEL connection agreement — IEEE 1547-2018 is the applicable interconnection standard direction, not Chinese GB/T; (4) BNFS fire-safety installation approval, with NFPA 855 as the expected fire code and UL 9540A fire propagation test data increasingly required; (5) UN 38.3 transport test documentation with Belize-specific tropical packaging requirements for Port of Belize City's high-humidity coastal environment; and (6) BBS conformity assessment — verify current BBS mandatory scope with BBS directly before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 伯利兹尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与国家认证方案相当。伯利兹的BESS项目依据PUC并网审批和BEL并网协议运作，项目级技术要求由国际开发金融条件（IDB、CDB、IFC）和北美/美洲工程标准主导。中国BESS出口伯利兹的实际差距包括：（1）根本性60 Hz对比50 Hz频率不匹配，以及分相110/220 V对比三相220/380 V电压不匹配——两者均需对储能变流器进行硬件重新设计和全面重新验证，而非仅软件重新配置；（2）UL 1973电芯和模组安全证据（或国际融资项目中的IEC 62619）作为美洲/加勒比方向项目验收的技术预期基准——中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被接受为替代依据；（3）PUC并网审批和BEL并网协议——适用并网标准方向为IEEE 1547-2018，而非中国GB/T；（4）BNFS消防安全安装审批，以NFPA 855作为预期消防规范，UL 9540A火焰传播测试数据越来越多地被要求；（5）UN 38.3运输测试文件，伯利兹城港口高湿度沿海环境需满足热带包装专项要求；（6）BBS合格评定——出货前直接向BBS核实BBS当前强制范围。
answer_first.zht: 貝里斯尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與國家認證方案相當。貝里斯的BESS項目依據PUC併網審批和BEL併網協議運作，項目級技術要求由國際開發金融條件（IDB、CDB、IFC）和北美/美洲工程標準主導。中國BESS出口貝里斯的實際差距包括：（1）根本性60 Hz對比50 Hz頻率不匹配，以及分相110/220 V對比三相220/380 V電壓不匹配——兩者均需對儲能變流器進行硬體重新設計和全面重新驗證，而非僅軟體重新配置；（2）UL 1973電芯和模組安全證據（或國際融資項目中的IEC 62619）作為美洲/加勒比方向項目驗收的技術預期基準——中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被接受為替代依據；（3）PUC併網審批和BEL併網協議——適用併網標準方向為IEEE 1547-2018，而非中國GB/T；（4）BNFS消防安全安裝審批，以NFPA 855作為預期消防規範，UL 9540A火焰傳播測試數據越來越多地被要求；（5）UN 38.3運輸測試文件，伯利兹城港口高濕度沿海環境需滿足熱帶包裝專項要求；（6）BBS合格評定——出貨前直接向BBS核實BBS當前強制範圍。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
